theme.name: Escola
theme.title: Escola
theme.author: Escola 4.0, SDGFP, GVA
theme.description: Based on CEFIRE de creación de recursos, SDGFP, GVA and an Example style for eXeLearning 3.iDevice icons by Francisco Javier Pulido Cuadrado.
